basicDetails.schemeName: Grant for the Repair of House (BBOCWWB)
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The &quot;Grant for the Repair of House&quot; scheme is implemented by the Bihar Building &amp; Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (BBOCWWB), Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹20,000/- is provided to registered construction workers who have been members of the Board for at least three years for the repair of their house. However, workers who have already received financial assistance for house construction, bicycles, or tools are not eligible for this benefit. The assistance is provided only once to each eligible worker.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹20,000/- is provided to registered construction workers for house repairs.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹20,000/- is provided to registered workers who have been members of the Board for at least three years for repair of house. However, workers who have already received assistance for house construction, bicycles, or tools are not eligible for this benefit.

children.text: The "Grant for the Repair of House" scheme is implemented by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (BBOCWWB), Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹20,000/- is provided to registered construction workers who have been members of the Board for at least three years for the repair of their house. However, workers who have already received financial assistance for house construction, bicycles, or tools are not eligible for this benefit. The assistance is provided only once to each eligible worker.
Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹20,000/- is provided to registered construction workers for house repairs.

applicationProcess.process_md: > **Registration of a Construction Worker under BBOCWWB:** **Step 1:** Visit the [Official Website](https://bocwscheme.bihar.gov.in/home) of the Bihar Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. **Step 2:** On the homepage, click on &quot;[Labour Registration](https://bocwscheme.bihar.gov.in/worker_reg)&quot;. **Step 3:** Enter your Aadhar card number and name, then click &quot;Authenticate&quot;. **Step 4:** A dashboard will appear. Enter all required details, ensuring that all fields marked with an asterisk (*) are filled in correctly. **Step 5:** Click on &quot;Submit&quot; and proceed to pay the application fee online. **Step 6:** You will receive your construction worker registration number upon successful registration. > **Apply for Scheme Benefits:** **Step 1:** Visit the [Official Website](https://bocwscheme.bihar.gov.in/home) of the Bihar Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. **Step 2:** Click on &quot;Login&quot; and select &quot;Labour&quot;. **Step 3:** Enter your registration number &amp; year of Birth, click &quot;Show&quot; to view your details. **Step 4:** Select the scheme you wish to apply for to avail the benefits. **Step 5:** Enter all required information and upload the necessary documents. **Step 6:** Click on &quot;Submit Application&quot; to complete the process. > **Application Tracking:** Applicant can track their application status online through the [official website](https://bocwscheme.bihar.gov.in/home) of the Bihar Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. Relevant updates will be sent to the registered mobile number.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The worker should be engaged in building or construction work.
   1. The worker should be registered with the Bihar Building &amp; Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
   1. The registered worker should have a minimum of three years of continuous membership.
   1. The worker&#39;s membership with the Welfare Board should be active at the time of application.
   1. The workers who have already received financial assistance for house construction, bicycles, or tools are not eligible for this benefit.
   1. The assistance will be provided only once to a worker.

children.text: The worker should be engaged in building or construction work.
The worker should be registered with the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
The registered worker should have a minimum of three years of continuous membership.
The worker's membership with the Welfare Board should be active at the time of application.
The workers who have already received financial assistance for house construction, bicycles, or tools are not eligible for this benefit.
The assistance will be provided only once to a worker.
